preconditions: official Gentoo live ISO target is reachable over SSH
live-preflight.skip_criteria: Current live ISO facts satisfy the same checks.
live-preflight.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun whenever the live ISO target changes or connectivity is uncertain.
live-preflight.recovery_advice: Fix SSH, network, DNS, or UEFI boot before continuing.

preconditions: live-preflight complete or equivalent live ISO access verified
completion_evidence: block device inventory with model, serial, size, filesystems, and mountpoints
validation: common/disk_detection returns a parseable block device report
disk-detection.skip_criteria: Current disk inventory is available and the selected disk facts still match recorded facts when a disk has been selected.
disk-detection.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun after VM reboot, hardware changes, or disk uncertainty.
disk-detection.recovery_advice: Inspect the reported disks and set INSTALL_DISK explicitly before disk-specific phases.

preconditions: INSTALL_DISK names exactly one target disk visible inside the live ISO
validation: common/disk_safety passes without destructive confirmation unless a caller requests it
disk-safety.skip_criteria: Current selected disk identity and descendant state match recorded evidence.
disk-safety.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun before every disk-sensitive phase.
disk-safety.recovery_advice: Do not continue until mounted descendants and disk identity are understood.

preconditions: PROFILE, FILESYSTEM, and STAGE3_FLAVOR are valid
install-plan.skip_criteria: Current inputs match the recorded plan inputs.
install-plan.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun whenever operator inputs change.
install-plan.recovery_advice: Fix PROFILE, FILESYSTEM, STAGE3_FLAVOR, or BOOT_MODE before continuing.

partition-plan.skip_criteria: Current disk state still matches the plan preconditions.
partition-plan.recovery_advice: Review the plan before any destructive target.

validation: expected ESP and root partitions exist after apply
partition-apply.skip_criteria: Partition table exactly matches expected layout and disk identity matches.
partition-apply.rerun_criteria: Not safe to rerun by default; requires explicit destructive confirmation and operator review.
partition-apply.recovery_advice: If interrupted, rerun partition-plan and destructive-safety-check before considering partition again.

filesystem-plan.skip_criteria: Current inputs and partition layout match plan preconditions.
filesystem-plan.recovery_advice: Fix partition layout or FILESYSTEM before formatting.

validation: expected filesystems exist on expected partitions
filesystem-apply.skip_criteria: Expected filesystems exist with matching type and UUID evidence.
filesystem-apply.rerun_criteria: Not safe to rerun by default; requires explicit destructive confirmation and operator review.
filesystem-apply.recovery_advice: Inspect filesystem signatures and rerun filesystem-plan before considering format again.

mount-plan.skip_criteria: Expected filesystems and mount options can still be derived.
mount-plan.recovery_advice: Fix filesystem evidence before mounting target paths.

mount-target.skip_criteria: Target mountpoints are already mounted exactly as planned.
mount-target.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun after mount validation confirms sources and options.
mount-target.recovery_advice: Unmount incorrect target mounts manually, record the manual step, then rerun mount-plan.

preconditions: target root is mounted at TARGET_MOUNT
stage3-install.skip_criteria: Verified stage3 extraction marker and target root baseline exist.
stage3-install.rerun_criteria: Conditionally safe after mount validation and extraction marker review.
stage3-install.recovery_advice: Remove incomplete extraction only after recording the manual recovery step.

chroot-preparation.skip_criteria: Required chroot mounts and DNS state already match.
chroot-preparation.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun after target root validation.
chroot-preparation.recovery_advice: Fix or unmount incorrect bind mounts, record manual recovery, then rerun prepare-chroot.

portage-baseline.skip_criteria: Target Portage config and selected profile match expected values.
portage-baseline.rerun_criteria: Conditionally safe when target root and profile facts match.
portage-baseline.recovery_advice: Rerun configure-portage after fixing network or profile mismatch.

preconditions: target root is mounted and Portage baseline exists
system-config.skip_criteria: Target files match expected hostname, timezone, locale, and keymap.
system-config.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun when desired identity inputs are unchanged.
system-config.recovery_advice: Fix invalid HOSTNAME, TIMEZONE, LOCALE, or KEYMAP and rerun configure-system.

preconditions: target filesystems exist and are mounted
fstab-generation.skip_criteria: fstab entries match current filesystem UUIDs and planned mounts.
fstab-generation.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun when UUIDs and mount plan match.
fstab-generation.recovery_advice: Regenerate fstab after filesystem or mount changes.

preconditions: chroot preparation and Portage baseline complete
kernel-install.skip_criteria: Expected kernel package and boot files exist.
kernel-install.rerun_criteria: Conditionally safe after target root and Portage validation.
kernel-install.recovery_advice: Rerun install-kernel after resolving Portage/package errors.

system-packages.skip_criteria: Package set and service enablement match expected profile/init system.
system-packages.rerun_criteria: Conditionally safe after target root and Portage validation.
system-packages.recovery_advice: Fix package conflicts or service enablement errors, then rerun this phase.

preconditions: user variables and approved secret input files are valid
users-and-access.skip_criteria: User and access state match expected non-secret policy.
users-and-access.rerun_criteria: Conditionally safe after validating secret input files and target root.
users-and-access.recovery_advice: Do not record secrets in state; fix secret input files and rerun users-preview before configure-users.

bootloader.skip_criteria: Bootloader evidence matches expected disk, EFI mount, and config.
bootloader.rerun_criteria: Not safe to rerun by default; requires bootloader confirmation and operator review.
bootloader.recovery_advice: Inspect EFI mount and boot entries before retrying bootloader installation.

final-checks.skip_criteria: Current target state passes final checks.
final-checks.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun before manual reboot.
final-checks.recovery_advice: Fix reported readiness issues before rebooting.

validation: current facts match required checkpoint evidence
resume-plan.skip_criteria: Not part of the install phase order.
resume-plan.rerun_criteria: Safe to rerun before every resume attempt.
resume-plan.recovery_advice: Resolve reported mismatches or record manual recovery before mutating phases.
